section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports pain in the right knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom rather than an exam or objective finding; however, it is redundant with HPI content and unlikely to mislead.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports left hand pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a subjective symptom report, not an exam finding or test result, so it fits better in the HPI, but the misplacement does not substantially distort clinical meaning.
